allow: PowerShell($u = Get-Command uv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($u\) { "uv: $\($u.Source\)"; uv --version } else { "uv: NOT INSTALLED" }; $x = Get-Command uvx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($x\) { "uvx: $\($x.Source\)" } else { "uvx: NOT INSTALLED" }; "---"; $cfg = "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\claude_desktop_config.json"; if \(Test-Path $cfg\) { "config exists: $cfg"; Get-Content $cfg } else { "config NOT FOUND at $cfg" })
